title: Client Block Pickup
description: Keep your inventory clean! A simple client-side mod for farmers that lets you toggle item pickup ON/OFF with one key.
body:
---

## 🛑 Client Block Pickup

**Client Block Pickup** is a lightweight, essential mod for technical Minecraft players and builders. It gives you absolute control over when you want to pick up items from the ground, ensuring your inventory stays clean during complex tasks.

> 🤖 **Note:** This mod's logic and compatibility layers were refined with the help of **Google Gemini**, ensuring a stable experience across different Minecraft versions.

---

### 📝 Long Description

Tired of your inventory getting clogged with junk while you're clearing out a perimeter or standing near a high-efficiency farm?
With **Client Block Pickup**, you can instantly disable the ability to pick up any dropped items. This is a **client-side only** mod, meaning you can use it on any server without needing to install it there!

### 🔍 How it Works

The mod doesn't just "turn off" pickups; it manages them smartly:

* **Save Your Items:** The mod ensures your current items are safe.
* **Filter the Rest:** Once toggled, it prevents any *new* or *additional* items from entering your inventory.
* **Auto-Clear Logic:** Any extra items that try to "sneak in" while the mod is active are effectively ignored, keeping your hotbar exactly how you want it.

### ⚙️ Features

* **Instantly Toggle Pickup**: Prevent your player from vacuuming up nearby items with a single click.
* **Perfect for Farming**: Ideal for AFK farms, large-scale sorting, or building when you don't want random blocks ruining your hotbar.

---

### ℹ️ Info

 ✅ **Mod Loader:** Fabric
 
 ✅ **Side:** Client-Side Only 🖥️ 
 
 ✅ **Requirement:** Fabric API

---

### 🛠️ Keybinds

* **Press 'P' (Default)**: Toggle Block Pickup On/Off.
*(You can easily rebind this in the Options > Controls > Key Binds menu)*

---
